---
title: "Student Assistant in Computational Biology and Bioinformatics"
description: "Image Data Analysis"
author: "Christof Seiler"
date: "2026-003-04"
categories: "Positions"
image: "../photos/cellpaintr-logo-thumbnail.png"
---

> Location: Schlieren, Switzerland\

## Position

- Employment: 40% for one year as a student assistants with Bachelor’s degree
- Start date: April 1, 2026 or as soon as possible

## Your Tasks

::: {.column-margin}
![](../photos/cellpaintr-logo.png)
:::

- Build a computational pipeline for drug screening in synovial fibroblasts 
- Work together with both computational people and molecular biologists
- Prepare our R package [cellpaintr](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16992887) for submission to Bioconductor
- Add new features to jointly analyze multiple assays and handle small sample sizes

## Your Profile

- Master’s student for the entire duration of the contract
- Bachelor’s degree in computer science, mathematics, or physics
- Experience analyzing biological data, ideally cell imaging data
- Experience with version control and high-performance computing
- Excellent programming skills in R and Python
- Bonus: Familiar with [CellProfiler](https://cellprofiler.org/) and [Bioconductor](https://www.bioconductor.org)

## Application Material

- Link to your GitHub repository
- Highlight one repository
- CV

Send your application material to `christof.seiler <at> usz.ch`. We will accept applications until the position is filled.

{{< include ../_links.qmd >}}
